headline: Ideas converge on selling the Lab itself. Pickle finds gold in sponsorships.
narrative: Your labs are telling you something interesting today. Two separate teams — general-purpose and pickle-idea-lab — independently surfaced the same strategic idea: sell the Idea Lab itself as a product. That's a convergent signal worth taking seriously. It suggests there's real conviction behind it, not just one team's curiosity. Meanwhile, your meta-lab flagged a blind spot in general-purpose: it's 53% wild-card ideas right now, which means it's great at generating creative possibilities but not stress-testing them for real-world execution risk. That's worth knowing about your own thinking.

callouts.title: Convergent signal: 'Sell the Idea Lab itself'
callouts.why_matters: Two independent labs surfaced this same strategic idea. Convergence like this usually means something real is there — worth exploring whether this is a genuine business opportunity.
callouts.action: Schedule a focused conversation with both teams about what they're actually envisioning. Is this licensing? SaaS? Something else?

callouts.title: General-purpose is 53% wildcard, light on execution risk
callouts.why_matters: Your creative lab is great at generating ideas but the meta-lab caught it's not systematically vetting feasibility. You could be building conviction around things that won't work.
callouts.action: Rebalance general-purpose's persona mix or pair it with a dedicated execution-risk assessor before betting on ideas.

callouts.title: Pickle's badge prediction hit 0.99 F1 — it's production-ready
callouts.why_matters: That's not incremental improvement, that's lock-in. The shot-scientist also found a 5x viral lift on overhead clips. You have both predictive accuracy and actionable insights.
callouts.action: Decide: push this into a product feature or double down on sponsorship whitespace intel (4 equipment categories, zero brand presence)?

callouts.title: New lab proposal: brand-intelligence-lab
callouts.why_matters: Meta-lab is proposing a new lab to dig into brand dynamics. You have sponsorship gaps and player-brand patterns waiting to be explored.
callouts.action: Just notice for now — see if the convergent signal and pickle's findings give you enough momentum to greenlight it next week.

callouts.title: 27% of corpus is low-quality casual content
callouts.why_matters: General-purpose identified 1181 records that are noise. This is either a filtering opportunity or a signal about what your data actually contains.
callouts.action: Clarify with the team: should we exclude this from future runs, or does it matter for certain analyses?

pickle-idea-lab.top_title: Sponsorship whitespace: 4 equipment categories with ZERO brand detection
